name: vizvasanlya-ai-dashboard
title: AI Operations Dashboard
subtitle: Model usage, cost, and quality controls
description: Track AI model usage, request volume, latency, safety checks, prompt quality, and cost signals in one operational workspace.

resources.title: Summarization pipeline
resources.detail: Production summarization flow with safety checks and latency monitoring.
resources.notes: Monitor prompt drift and cache hit rate daily.

resources.title: Embedding cache
resources.detail: Reusable embeddings for repeat customer queries.
resources.notes: Track cache invalidation after model updates.

resources.title: Safety policy filter
resources.detail: Policy checks for generated answers and tool calls.

resources.title: Prompt template library
resources.detail: Shared prompt patterns for support, sales, and operations.
resources.notes: Add evaluation examples for each template.

resources.title: Model cost forecast
resources.detail: Forecast spend from traffic growth and model mix.

resources.title: Evaluation dataset
resources.detail: Golden dataset for regression testing model changes.
resources.notes: Add edge cases for policy and grounding.
